scene_check_osd_failed_focus: Screen obstructed, please disable FPS overlay

preset.AFK.label: AFK Tasks
preset.FullDaily.label: Full Daily
preset.FullDaily.description: Complete a full set of daily tasks
preset.QuickDaily.label: Quick Daily
preset.RealtimeAssist.label: Real-time Assistance
preset.RealtimeAssist.description: Real-time assistance feature, your exploration helper!
task_withdraw_money_label: Collect earnings the cofe by origen
task_withdraw_money_desc: Auto collect cafe earnings, supports auto switching products based on weather vane
task_withdraw_money_option_choose_produc: Auto list products by weather vane earnings (character skills not considered)
task_furniture_desc: Claim 3 known furniture items in sequence (Hamster Ball / Mianmian / Damaged Wooden Box). Note: Does not guarantee claiming newly placed furniture.
task_claim_rewards_desc: Auto claim the City Stamina / Circle bounty rewards。
task_fish_new_desc:
Redesigned fishing feature. In theory, you can now fish indefinitely.
It is still not possible to directly resume overnight fishing sessions that have been interrupted by the monthly pass. You can try setting up a scheduled task to continue fishing, but results are not guaranteed.
The fishing feature only hack-on and uses the mouse for automatically buying bait and selling fish.
The auto-buy bait function purchases bait or switches to universal bait when it detects a shortage (the bait detection threshold is unrelated to this task), and the auto-sell function attempts to sell fish when Fish Scale Coins are low.
task_fish_option_infinite_desc: If once enabled, the fishing task will loop indefinitely until manually stopped.
task_fish_option_count_desc: Set every cycles of fishing(count) at auto mode, recommended less than or equal to 99
task_fish_option_auto_sell_desc: Whether to enable the auto sell fish feature
task_fish_option_auto_buy_bait_desc: Automatically purchase 99 (max) fish baits each time, frontend only
task_fish_option_bait_threshold_desc: If unable to recognize the bait position, please lower this value
task_fish_option_loop_time_desc: How many times to run the fishing task
task_realtime_desc: Real-time assistance tools, requires“Win32 - Front Desk”Controller
task_make_coffee_desc: Start the task on the stage selection page. Nanali must be in the party and her City Skill must be upgraded to level 3.
task_make_coffee_lite_desc: Start the task on the stage selection page. No special character is required
task_rhythm_option_auto_select_desc: When enabled, the song will be automatically selected (Mayoiuta); when disabled, the target song will be manually specified
task_rhythm_option_song_select_desc: Select the song you want to play
task_rhythm_option_auto_play_desc: When enabled, the song will be run at auto-combo to played; when disabled, it will be played once
task_rhythm_option_play_mode: Auto-combo until have no any City Stamina
task_rhythm_option_play_mode_desc: When enabled, the song will be auto-combo until have no any City Stamina; when disabled, the auto-combo times will be determined by the option of Auto-combo times
task_rhythm_option_fps_desc: The frame rate of the performance loop, recommended 30~120
task_tetris_desc: <font color='red'>In this task, the in-game board is managed entirely by the internal AI, rather than by capturing screenshots. Please do not interact with the game screen while running this task to ensure that the AI’s decisions align with the actual game state.</font>
task_fountain_desc: Identify and click the Nacupeda's Pool Check-in button。
task_bagel_spam_desc: Automatically takes a photo, saves it, and publishes Bagel content. Front controller only.
task_bagel_spam_option_text_mode_desc: Choose how to generate forum post text
task_bagel_spam_option_text_desc: Use ; to separate multiple items for random selection, leave single item for fixed text
task_bagel_spam_option_llm_model_desc: Multimodal model name (must support image understanding), e.g. gpt-4o
task_bagel_spam_option_llm_prompt_desc: Describe the desired posting style, e.g.: casual, humorous, use internet slang, etc.
task_bagel_spam_option_publish_count_des: Set the number of times to publish
task_sound_dodge_desc: Audio-based automatic evasion and counterattack, require“Win32 - Front Desk”Controller
task_autofscroll_label: Fast picking for mission: Pink Paws Heist (Hold down F to trigger)
task_autofscroll_desc: When opened, it will Hold F+ and use the scroll wheel to pick up items quickly（Hold down F to trigger）
task_auto_piano_desc: Read MIDI scores and send keyboard playing signals to the current target window.
task.RealTime.option.RealTimeAutoLoot.de: Automatically click to pick up items when a lootable indicator is detected, regardless of what it is
task_realtime_option_auto_skip_story_des: Automatically click the skip story button
task_realtime_option_skip_story_dialog: Automatically check “Don't ask me again today”.
task_realtime_option_skip_story_dialog_d: In the skip story pop-up, automatically check ‘Don't ask me again today’ to avoid having to confirm every time.
task.RealTime.option.RealTimeAutoSkipSto: Automatically click "Confirm" to skip when the story summary dialog appears
task.RealTime.option.RealTimeAutoSkipImp: Automatically click "Confirm" to skip when the important story prompt dialog appears
task_realtime_option_auto_teleport_desc: Detect specific teleportation points and click to teleport automatically
task_realtime_option_teleport_witte_desc: Whether to detect the teleportation points of Wertheimer Tower
task_realtime_option_teleport_phone_desc: Whether to detect the teleportation points of ReroRero Phone Booth
task_tetris_option_auto_repeat_desc: When enabled, the game will automatically repeat multiple rounds; when disabled, only one round will be performed
task_tetris_option_consume_vitality_desc: When enabled, the system will automatically detect City Stamina levels and stop automatically when City Stamina is depleted; when disabled, it will repeat for the specified number of rounds specified number of rounds
task_tetris_option_speed_drop_desc: When enabled, blocks will automatically drop at a faster rate after translation/rotation
task_sound_dodge_option_enable_desc: When enabled, the system will automatically trigger evasion based on game audio cues
task_sound_dodge_option_dodge_only_desc: When enabled, only evasion will be executed; when disabled, both evasion and counterattack will be executed
task_sound_dodge_option_dodge_threshold_: Evasion audio cue recognition threshold, range 0.0-1.0, the lower the more sensitive
task_sound_dodge_option_counter_threshol: Counterattack audio cue recognition threshold, range 0.0-1.0, the lower the more sensitive
task_test_movement_turn_desc: 鼠标相对位移转向。dx=100 ≈ 10度，正值右转，负值左转。
task_test_movement_forward_desc: 按住 W 键前进指定时长（秒）。
task_test_movement_backward_desc: 按住 S 键后退指定时长（秒）。
task_test_movement_option_turn_dx_desc: 鼠标 delta 总量。dx=100 ≈ 10度，dx=900 ≈ 90度。正值右转，负值左转。
task_auto_piano_input_song_path_desc: Relative paths are resolved from the project root directory, e.g. songs/example.mid. Absolute paths are also accepted.
task_auto_piano_input_speed_pattern_msg: Please enter a number greater than 0, e.g. 1.0 or 1.25.
task_auto_piano_input_transpose_pattern_: Please enter an integer number of semitones, e.g. -12, 0, 7.
task_auto_piano_input_range_mode_desc: fold = octave fold (default, keeps all notes but may collide); shift = auto-transpose + cut (correct intervals, recommended for multi-track); cut = direct cut (keeps only 60~95 range).
task_auto_piano_input_range_mode_pattern: Please enter fold, shift, or cut.
task_witch_divination_desc: Automatically go to the Witch's House and perform divination. Requires [Win32 - Front] connection mode
task_auto_drive_dataset_recorder_desc: Before starting this task, make sure the minimap destination is set. The default recording duration is 60 seconds, with 2 samples per second.
task_touch_desc: Detect "Touch" button and auto execute: Press F → Click interaction area → Press ESC, repeat 100 times
task_touch_option_loop_count_desc: Number of times to repeat the sequence
task_touch_option_delay_after_f_desc: Delay time after pressing F key (milliseconds)
task_touch_option_delay_after_click_desc: Delay time after clicking interaction area (milliseconds)
task_navi_move_to_desc: Enter big-map coordinates and move toward them using live localization and direction prediction.
task_navi_move_to_option_settings_desc: Configure the target coordinates, arrival tolerance, and maximum run time.
task_online_map_navigation_desc: Start a bidirectional Navi WebSocket, broadcast live position and direction to the online map, then receive waypoints and follow them in order.
task_online_map_navigation_option_settin: Configure WebSocket, sampling interval, and navigation runtime parameters. WebSocket position state uses raw game coordinates.
task_online_map_navigation_option_positi: Select the live position source. Auto prefers network positioning and falls back to visual positioning during startup when unavailable.
task_online_map_navigation_option_angle_: Choose the inference backend used by the angle model. Auto is the default.
task_online_map_navigation_option_debug_: Show positioning and angle prediction debug windows when enabled.
task_online_map_navigation_input_frame_i: Minimum interval between screenshot localization runs. The action clamps it to at least 0.05 seconds.
task.SyncCharacterAbilityCityAbility.des: Automatically identify life skill levels of all characters and record them in the configuration file.
task.SyncCharacterAbilityCityAbility.opt:
Overwrite existing character life skill records
Note: This will clear all previous records.
Use this option to clear and overwrite previous content if you find issues with the existing records.
